parameters.jsCode:
// HTTP node split the events array into N items — collect them all const eventList = $input.all().map(i => i.json); // Fold all stateDeltas in order to get final state const state = {}; for (const ev of eventList) { const delta = ev?.actions?.stateDelta || {}; for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(delta)) { if (k.startsWith('_')) continue; state[k] = v; } } let extraction = state.extraction; if (typeof extraction === 'string') { try { extraction = JSON.parse(extraction.replace(/^```json\s*|\s*```$/g, '')); } catch { extraction = {}; } } const emailType = extraction?.email_type || 'UNKNOWN'; const draftPO = state.draft_purchase_order || null; const hitlQueue = Array.isArray(state.hitl_queue) ? state.hitl_queue : []; const summary = state.po_summary || ''; let outcome; if (draftPO) outcome = 'po_drafted'; else if (hitlQueue.length > 0) outcome = 'hitl_review'; else if (emailType === 'DUPLICATE') outcome = 'duplicate'; else outcome = 'no_action'; const orig = $('Get a message').first().json; const replyTo = orig.from?.value?.[0]?.address; const subjectByOutcome = { po_drafted: `[BOM Pipeline] Draft PO ready: ${draftPO?.po_number || ''}`, hitl_review: `[BOM Pipeline] Review needed (${hitlQueue.length} lines)`, duplicate: `[BOM Pipeline] Email classified as duplicate / non-BOM`, no_action: `[BOM Pipeline] No action taken`, }; return [{ json: { outcome, email_type: emailType, summary, draft_po: draftPO, hitl_queue: hitlQueue, extraction, reply_to: replyTo, reply_subject: subjectByOutcome[outcome], reply_body_html: `

${summary || 'Pipeline completed.'}

` + (draftPO ? `

PO: ${draftPO.po_number}

` : '') + (hitlQueue.length ? `

HITL items: ${hitlQueue.length}

` : ''), }, }];
